title: Roasted
body:
# Roasted
This small mod adds marshmallows that can be roasted on a campfire, as well as a few other marshmallow-related blocks and items!

**Getting Started:**

Craft some marshmallows with 8 sugar, then craft a marshmallow with a stick to get a Marshmallow on a Stick. Find a campfire and start roasting! The longer you roast, the more it will cook the marshmallow. If you cook it too long, it will become burnt or charred and will give you less powerful effects than if it's roasted perfectly. You can tell how roasted it is by the texture. If it's golden-brown, it's done and ready to eat! Perfectly roasted marshmallows give speed 3 and haste 2 for 20 seconds, with the other marshmallows giving less powerful effects for less time.

Marshmallows on a Stick can be crafted into S'mores using 2 cookies, and a marshmallow on a stick. S'mores retain the marshmallow's 'roastedness' value, so a perfectly roasted marshmallow will give you a perfect s'more!

---
<details>
<summary>Content</summary>
- Marshmallows, crafted from 8 sugar

- Marshmallow on a Stick, crafted from a marshmallow and a stick. Can be roasted on a campfire. Try to roast it perfectly for the best effects!

- S'mores, crafted from two cookies and a marshmallow on a stick. Carries over the Marshmallow's roastedness, and its stackable.

- Soul Roasted Marshmallow, created from roasting a marshmallow on a stick over a soul campfire. Effects work the same as on normal marshmallows, but last twice as long.

- Pile of Marshmallows, crafted from 4 marshmallows. Can be roasted by placing it on a campfire.
</details>

---
<details>
<summary>FAQ</summary>
Fabric?
Not planned.

Can you backport to version x?
I won't be backporting the mod, however I will try to stay up to date with modern versions of Minecraft and Forge.

Can you add x?
I'd like to keep this mod small, but feel free to leave suggestions in the Discord.

Who made the fantastic logo?
Uraneptus made the logo! (Twitter: https://twitter.com/uraneptus2)

Who created the soul roasted marshmallow textures?
The talented artist, CeasingBonsai17, made them!

</details>
